description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with a striking black and white color palette. The structure is composed of two main stories, with a prominent sloped roof and a mix of solid and transparent wall sections. Large glass panels and balcony railings provide visual openness, while green areas on the ground level suggest integrated landscaping or patios. The facade includes a combination of recessed and protruding elements, creating depth and architectural interest. The entryway is defined by a sheltered area and a set of steps, with visible doors and windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a sloped roof, black and white exterior, large glass panels, and integrated green patio areas. The design features clean lines, asymmetrical windows, and a sheltered entryway.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entryway, glass railings, green patio areas, and the sloped roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid black wall, minimal window openings, and the continuation of the sloped roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying geometric wall patterns, limited window exposure, and green patio spaces on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible balconies, glass railings, and a clear view of the green patio and entry steps.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels and balcony railings
attribute_entryway_design: Sheltered entryway with steps, glass railing, and a modern door integrated into the facade
